    Bibliography Manual

Function reference

Time Scales

calendar()
Calendar
calendar_label() calendar_name() calendar_unit() calendar_epoch() calendar_direction()
Calendar Parameters
convert()
Calendar Converter
BP() b2k() BC() BCE() AD() CE()
Gregorian Calendar
J()
Julian Calendar

Rata die

as_date()
Date Conversion from Rata Die
as_decimal()
Converts a Date to a Decimal of its Year
as_year()
Year Conversion from Rata Die
fixed()
Rata Die (Fixed Date)
fixed_from_BP() fixed_to_BP() fixed_from_BC() fixed_to_BC() fixed_from_BCE() fixed_to_BCE() fixed_from_AD() fixed_to_AD() fixed_from_CE() fixed_to_CE() fixed_from_b2k() fixed_to_b2k()
Gregorian Year Conversion to and from Rata Die

Time Series

plot(<TimeSeries>,<missing>)
Plot Time Series
series()
Create Time Series
span()
Duration of Time Series
start(<RataDie>) start(<TimeSeries>) end(<RataDie>) end(<TimeSeries>)
Terminal Times of Time Series
time(<RataDie>) time(<TimeSeries>) frequency(<RataDie>) frequency(<TimeSeries>)
Sampling Times of Time Series
window(<TimeSeries>)
Time Series Windows

Operators

Arith(<RataDie>,<RataDie>)
Arithmetic Operators

Mutators

is_gregorian() is_julian()
Predicates
mutators get set
Get or Set Parts of an Object
`[`(<RataDie>,<ANY>,<ANY>,<ANY>) `[`(<TimeSeries>,<ANY>,<ANY>,<ANY>)
Extract or Replace Parts of an Object

Allen’s Interval Algebra

allen_complement()
Complement of an Allen Relation
allen_composition()
Composition of Allen Relations
allen_converse()
Converse of an Allen Relation
allen_intersect()
Intersection of Allen Relations
allen_relation()
Allen Relation Between Definite Intervals
allen_union()
Union of Allen Relations

On this page

chronos is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.
